    we skip errors copying them. This supports tools that may create e.g.

z'Get file and optionally check its hash.N)

get_file_url
j	rVt
Unpack link into location, downloading if required.
    :param hashes: A Hashes object, one of whose embedded hashes must match,
        or HashMismatch will be raised. If the Hashes is empty, no matches are
        required, and unhashable types of requirements (like VCS ones, which
        would ordinarily raise HashUnsupported) are allowed.
    N)

z)Prepare an already-installed requirement.z
Requirement %s: %s (%s)z
Since it is already installed, we are trusting this package without checking its hash. To ensure a completely repeatable environment, install into an empty virtualenv.N)	rM
